summary: ISS-2206 is over-routed. Dome review-response.html (commit 5021eec, 2026-04-17) was already exhaustively analyzed by EXP-171/EXP-173 and integrated at Sections 4.6 (Registry Framing Audit), 8.17 (April 2026 Escalation catalog), and 8b (Fair Auditor list adjudication). The five cited WINs (013, 014, 058, 068, 069) all have verdicts whose engagement with the dome reframings is already documented. WIN-068 has a dome concession worth an optional one-sentence acknowledgement touch (verification-class). The OTS canary remains UN-tripped 75+ days after the 2026-03-15 prediction freeze — dome wrote prose `scope clarified` but never separated prediction documents from observation documents for independent anchoring. Poller already tracks review-response.html (monitor/prompts/poller.md line 136), so the integrity finding`s `if not already tracked` caveat is satisfied. Close as already-covered. Two OPTIONAL verification-class M1 touches enumerated in EXP-435 recommended_decider_action.secondary_optional are non-blocking.
